title: coelorachis tessellata
intro: Coelorachis tessellata, also known as the Tessellated Spike-grass or Coelorachis grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Coelorachis tessellata include the treatment of fever, headache, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of Coelorachis tessellata may include infusions or decoctions made from the leaves and roots of the plant, which can be taken orally or applied topically to the affected area.
